nodes.label: T4 Instrument — Remaining Screens Converted (Design Render Sheet)

properties.description: Design render sheet T4 showing all remaining screens in the instrument grammar: Space Grotesk + JetBrains Mono, hairline rules, flat status tags with leading square, 2px corners, accent as single action. Screens shown: S1 Login, S3 Pick Retailer, S3-states Quick-add/Resume-draft, S5 Review/Confirm, S5-off/S6 Offline Submit/Confirmation, S7 Order Detail editable, S7-states Locked/Processed/Cancelled, S10 Pick Slip.
properties.app_name: Ganpati Enterprises Order Capture - Field Sales

nodes.label: S1 Login Screen — Get In Once

properties.screen_purpose: Field sales login for Ganpati Enterprises order capture app
components: GE avatar/logo block
email input (raju@ganpati.in)
password input with SHOW toggle
Keep me signed in checkbox (~30 days on this phone)
Sign in CTA (blue primary button)
Forgot password link (call office to reset)
properties.design_notes: Sharp fields, mono labels, one accent action. Wrong-credentials + deactivated errors render as flat red-edged strips (red reserved for errors/Cancelled); same inline spinner in accent block. Seen *monthly* — session persists.

properties.screen_purpose: Select retailer for new order — shows recents then all shops with search
components: Back arrow + step indicator (SUB ORDER STEP 1/3)
Shop name or area search input
RECENT section: Sharma Electronics (Sadar Bazaar), Mobile Point (Station Road), Krishna Telecom (Gandhi Chowk)
ALL SHOPS section: New Bharat Electronics (Main Market) with NEW amber tag
+ Add new shop link at bottom
properties.design_notes: Recents cover most picks. Search, no-results=quick-add (typed name carried over). Quick-add form inherits this styling; resume-draft prompt appears as flat bottom sheet with NEW tag = same amber square-family used for pending verification.

properties.screen_purpose: Add new shop quick-add form with resume-draft bottom sheet overlay
components: Add new shop form: SHOP NAME (New Bharat Electronics), AREA (Main Market), PHONE (90909 80808)
Saved as NEW — pending verification notice (amber)
Add & start order CTA (blue)
Resume-draft bottom sheet: Continue order for Sharma Electronics? (3 items, ₹4,478, saved 11:31)
Continue order button
Start fresh button
properties.design_notes: Name is the only required field. Resume prompt is a flat sheet with 2px ink top-edge — no rounded modal, no shadow theatre.

properties.screen_purpose: Order review screen before final submission — shows full order summary
components: Back arrow + step indicator (STEP 3/3)
Retailer: Sharma Electronics, Sadar Bazaar with Change link
Line items: Micro Usb Cable MU240-ZB CABLE (White) ₹600 qty 10 @₹60, ADAPTOR (MA104B WHITE) ZEB ₹1,820 qty 5 @₹364, SPK-PSPK 44 PORTABLE BTH SPEAKER (ASTRA 40 BLACK) ₹2,058 qty 2 @₹1,029
Quantity stepper controls (- / +)
NOTES FOR THE OFFICE textarea (23/500 chars, 'deliver Tuesday morning')
Total: 3 items ₹4,478
Submit order CTA (blue)
properties.design_notes: Steppers are the compact 40×42 cells; figures mono. Submit-failed/offline swaps the CTA to an amber Retry over a flat amber-edged 'Saved on phone — not submitted yet' strip; retry is idempotent and the copy says so.

nodes.label: S5-off / S6 — Offline Submit / Order Confirmation

properties.screen_purpose: Two states: offline/failed submission (S5-off) and successful order submission confirmation (S6)
components: S5-off: amber strip 'Saved on phone — not submitted yet', 'RETRYING NEVER CREATES A DUPLICATE' note, Retry submit button (amber)
S6: green checkmark, ORDER SUBMITTED heading, ORD-2026-1042, Sharma Electronics ₹4,478, 'Editable until 13:42', Back to Home button (blue), View order link
properties.design_notes: S6 only renders on confirmed server success; the ref is the mono headline read out in disputes. Offline paths stay on S5 with the amber strip.

properties.screen_purpose: Order detail view with edit window open — shows full order, history, and edit/cancel actions
components: ORD-2026-1042 header with SUBMITTED TODAY 11:42
Status chips: Submitted (blue), editable 1h 12m
Retailer: Sharma Electronics, Sadar Bazaar, phone 98765 43210
Line items with quantities and prices (same 3 items, ₹4,478 total)
NOTES: deliver Tuesday morning
HISTORY: 12:05 Edited — MU240 qty 8→10, 11:42 Submitted by you
Cancel order button (outlined)
Edit order button (blue)
properties.design_notes: Snapshot prices (submit-time), mono timestamps in the log. Edit reopens 2b pre-filled.

properties.screen_purpose: Order status state chips showing Locked, Processed, and Cancelled states with explanatory messages
components: Submitted + Locked chips: 'The edit window has ended. Call the accountant to change this order.' — No Edit/Cancel buttons (gone, not disabled)
Processed chip (green): 'Booked into Tally by the office. For any change, call the accountant.' (amber highlighted text)
Cancelled chip (red): 'Cancelled today 11:05 — by you.'
properties.design_notes: Locked is derived — window expiry or accountant processed; same chip either way. Processing flips the salesman read-only instantly.

nodes.label: S10 Pick Slip — A4 Prices Off (Godown)

properties.screen_purpose: Pick slip preview and print screen — A4 format for godown staff, prices togglable
components: ORD-2026-1042 header with pick slip label
Prices off / Prices on toggle buttons
Print button (dark)
A4 pick slip preview: GANPATI ENTERPRISES header, ORD-2026-1042, PICK SLIP label, Submitted date/time (06 Jul 2026, 11:42), Retailer: Sharma Electronics Sadar Bazaar, Ph: 98765 43210
properties.design_notes: Prices off by default for godown use — staff sees quantities without prices.
